protein_name: When overexpressed, reduces the number of both early and late non-adherent myeloid progenitor cells. Belongs to the MEGF family. Expressed in umbilical vein endothelial cells and platelets (at protein level). Expressed in heart, kidney, skeletal muscle, pancreas, ovary, breast, lung, brain cortex, hypothalamus, spinal cord, dorsal root ganglion, endothelial cells of umbilical cord artery and vein, megakaryocytes, osteoblasts, coronary muscle and erythroid cells. Weakly expressed in peripheral blood leukocytes and macrophages. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: lamellipodium; membrane; phagocytic cup; plasma membrane
raw_fields.Biological Process: phosphatidylinositol 3-kinase/protein kinase B signal transduction; platelet aggregation; positive regulation of platelet activation
